title: New big-picture conventions reference: structure ladder + container DoR
description:
Add the convention ladder and container Definition-of-Ready as a reference (design section 7). Create skills/ticks/references/big-picture.md and link it from the SKILL.md big-picture section and/or tick-patterns.md. Cover: the opt-in structure ladder (just-ship-it = epics+deps only [default], then +grouping [buckets/projects], then +dates [target_date], then +cycles [named project conventions]); a container Definition-of-Ready (mark epic only when you intend to run the children as a coordinated unit; otherwise leave a passive bucket); and cycle/milestone/initiative expressed purely as project conventions (a cycle = a project with a target_date; a milestone = a bottom-stack project; an initiative = a project of projects). Each rung additive and ignorable.

Match the vocabulary in the rewritten SKILL.md (read it first). CRITICAL: verify every tk command against cmd/tk/cmd/*.go.

Files: NEW skills/ticks/references/big-picture.md (plus a link line in SKILL.md or tick-patterns.md).
acceptance_criteria: a conventions reference exists (references/big-picture.md, linked from SKILL.md and/or tick-patterns.md) covering the just-ship-it→+grouping→+dates→+cycles ladder, when to mark epic vs leave a passive bucket (container Definition-of-Ready), and cycle/milestone/initiative as project conventions; vocabulary matches SKILL.md; tk commands verified
